requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — GSO MEPS for Household Refrigerators (QGOSM / GSO minimum energy performance)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——家用电冰箱的GSO能效限值（QGOSM / GSO最低能效性能）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——家用電冰箱的GSO能效限值（QGOSM / GSO最低能效性能）

summary.en: Household refrigerators placed on the Qatar market must meet the GSO minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) for refrigerating appliances, adopted by QGOSM under the GCC-wide energy-efficiency programme. The GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency standard (the GSO equivalent for household refrigerating appliances, based on the IEC 62552 series of test methods) sets minimum allowable energy-efficiency levels and the calculation basis (energy-efficiency ratio / index from rated volume, climate class and measured consumption). A refrigerator that does not meet the GSO MEPS floor cannot be registered with QGOSM or legally sold in Qatar. Energy measurement must follow the GSO-adopted IEC 62552 test methods, and the measured consumption underpins both the MEPS pass/fail determination and the energy-efficiency label (see frigqa-energy-002). The Gulf climate class (high-ambient testing relevant to the GCC) is a key consideration for refrigerators destined for Qatar.
summary.zh: 投放卡塔尔市场的家用电冰箱须满足GSO制冷器具最低能效标准（MEPS），该标准由QGOSM在海湾整体能效计划下采用。GSO电冰箱能效标准（家用制冷器具的GSO对应标准，基于IEC 62552系列试验方法）规定了最低允许能效水平及计算基准（依据额定容积、气候等级和实测耗电量得出的能效比/能效指数）。不满足GSO MEPS下限的电冰箱不能在QGOSM注册，也不能在卡塔尔合法销售。能效测量须遵循GSO采用的IEC 62552试验方法，实测耗电量同时作为MEPS合格判定及能效标签（见frigqa-energy-002）的依据。海湾气候等级（与海湾国家相关的高环境温度测试）是销往卡塔尔的电冰箱的关键考虑因素。
summary.zht: 投放卡塔爾市場的家用電冰箱須滿足GSO製冷器具最低能效標準（MEPS），該標準由QGOSM在海灣整體能效計畫下採用。GSO電冰箱能效標準（家用製冷器具的GSO對應標準，基於IEC 62552系列試驗方法）規定了最低允許能效水平及計算基準（依據額定容積、氣候等級和實測耗電量得出的能效比/能效指數）。不滿足GSO MEPS下限的電冰箱不能在QGOSM註冊，也不能在卡塔爾合法銷售。能效測量須遵循GSO採用的IEC 62552試驗方法，實測耗電量同時作為MEPS合格判定及能效標籤（見frigqa-energy-002）的依據。海灣氣候等級（與海灣國家相關的高環境溫度測試）是銷往卡塔爾的電冰箱的關鍵考慮因素。

standards_or_laws: GSO refrigerator energy-efficiency / MEPS standard for household refrigerating appliances (adopted by QGOSM under the GCC energy-efficiency programme; minimum allowable energy-efficiency levels)
GSO IEC 62552 (Parts 1-3) — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (GSO-adopted measurement basis for MEPS and labelling)
QGOSM product registration — MEPS pass is a precondition of registration and sale in Qatar

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerators is GB 12021.2-2015 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators). It establishes energy-efficiency grades (Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 the minimum threshold) and minimum annual energy-consumption limits, enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label system administered with NDRC. Testing follows GB/T 8059-2016 (aligned with the IEC 62552 series). The GB 12021.2 grade thresholds and the GSO MEPS levels are set by different bodies on different bases — a Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not guarantee that the unit meets the GSO MEPS floor, particularly under the high-ambient Gulf climate-class test conditions.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）。该标准规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值，由市场监管总局（SAMR）在与国家发改委（NDRC）共同管理的中国能效标识制度下执行。测试遵循GB/T 8059-2016（与IEC 62552系列一致）。GB 12021.2等级门槛与GSO MEPS水平由不同机构基于不同基准设定——中国1级或2级评定不保证该产品满足GSO MEPS下限，尤其在海湾气候等级的高环境温度测试条件下。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）。該標準規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值，由市場監管總局（SAMR）在與國家發改委（NDRC）共同管理的中國能效標識制度下執行。測試遵循GB/T 8059-2016（與IEC 62552系列一致）。GB 12021.2等級門檻與GSO MEPS水平由不同機構基於不同基準設定——中國1級或2級評定不保證該產品滿足GSO MEPS下限，尤其在海灣氣候等級的高環境溫度測試條件下。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under the China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances test methods (aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps apply: (1) Different MEPS basis — the GSO MEPS floor and its energy-efficiency-ratio/index methodology differ from the GB 12021.2-2015 grade framework. A Chinese energy grade does not map directly to a GSO MEPS pass; the unit's consumption must be measured to the GSO-adopted IEC 62552 method and assessed against the GSO MEPS level before QGOSM registration. (2) Gulf high-ambient test conditions — Qatar's climate means the relevant GSO climate-class/ambient test conditions are at the high end; a refrigerator that passes GB 12021.2 under Chinese standard ambient conditions may consume more (and risk failing MEPS) under the higher Gulf ambient temperatures, so high-ambient performance must be verified. A GSO MEPS failure is a hard gate: the product cannot be registered or sold in Qatar.
gap.zh: 存在两项差距：（1）MEPS基准不同——GSO MEPS下限及其能效比/能效指数方法与GB 12021.2-2015等级框架不同。中国能效等级不直接对应GSO MEPS合格；须按GSO采用的IEC 62552方法测量产品耗电量，并在QGOSM注册前对照GSO MEPS水平评估。（2）海湾高环境温度测试条件——卡塔尔气候意味着相关GSO气候等级/环境温度测试条件处于高端；在中国标准环境条件下通过GB 12021.2的电冰箱，在更高的海湾环境温度下可能耗电更多（并有未通过MEPS的风险），因此须核实高环境温度性能。GSO MEPS未通过是强制性门槛：产品不能在卡塔尔注册或销售。
gap.zht: 存在兩項差距：（1）MEPS基準不同——GSO MEPS下限及其能效比/能效指數方法與GB 12021.2-2015等級框架不同。中國能效等級不直接對應GSO MEPS合格；須按GSO採用的IEC 62552方法測量產品耗電量，並在QGOSM註冊前對照GSO MEPS水平評估。（2）海灣高環境溫度測試條件——卡塔爾氣候意味著相關GSO氣候等級/環境溫度測試條件處於高端；在中國標準環境條件下通過GB 12021.2的電冰箱，在更高的海灣環境溫度下可能耗電更多（並有未通過MEPS的風險），因此須核實高環境溫度性能。GSO MEPS未通過是強制性門檻：產品不能在卡塔爾註冊或銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — meeting the GSO MEPS floor (measured to the GSO-adopted IEC 62552 method) is a precondition of QGOSM registration and legal sale in Qatar
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy-efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) / Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GSO MEPS compliance, measured to the GSO-adopted IEC 62552 method, is a mandatory gate for QGOSM registration and sale of household refrigerators in Qatar. A Chinese GB 12021.2 energy grade does not substitute; high-ambient Gulf climate-class performance must be verified, as a refrigerator passing under Chinese ambient conditions may fail the GSO MEPS floor at higher Gulf temperatures.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 按GSO采用的IEC 62552方法测量的GSO MEPS合规是家用电冰箱在卡塔尔进行QGOSM注册和销售的强制性门槛。中国GB 12021.2能效等级不能替代；须核实海湾气候等级的高环境温度性能，因为在中国环境条件下通过的电冰箱可能在更高的海湾温度下未达GSO MEPS下限。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 按GSO採用的IEC 62552方法測量的GSO MEPS合規是家用電冰箱在卡塔爾進行QGOSM註冊和銷售的強制性門檻。中國GB 12021.2能效等級不能替代；須核實海灣氣候等級的高環境溫度性能，因為在中國環境條件下通過的電冰箱可能在更高的海灣溫度下未達GSO MEPS下限。

requirement_topic.en: Energy-Efficiency Label — GSO / Qatar Energy Label for Refrigerators (QGOSM)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——家用电冰箱的GSO / 卡塔尔能效标签（QGOSM）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——家用電冰箱的GSO / 卡塔爾能效標籤（QGOSM）

summary.en: Household refrigerators sold in Qatar must carry the GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label administered by QGOSM under the GCC energy-efficiency labelling programme. The label displays the energy-efficiency rating (a GSO star-band / class scale), the rated/total volume, the measured annual energy consumption, and identifying model data, and must be affixed to the appliance and shown at point of sale. The label rating is derived from energy measurement to the GSO-adopted IEC 62552 test method and the GSO energy-efficiency calculation, consistent with the MEPS determination in frigqa-energy-001. The label must be earned through the QGOSM conformity/registration process before the product is placed on the Qatar market — a refrigerator cannot be sold without a valid GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label. Label format, language (Arabic, typically with English), and content follow the GSO/QGOSM labelling requirements.
summary.zh: 在卡塔尔销售的家用电冰箱须附贴由QGOSM在海湾能效标识计划下管理的GSO/卡塔尔能效标签。该标签标注能效评级（GSO星级/等级体系）、额定/总容积、实测年耗电量及型号识别数据，须加贴于器具并在销售点展示。标签评级源自按GSO采用的IEC 62552试验方法进行的能效测量及GSO能效计算，与frigqa-energy-001中的MEPS判定一致。标签须在产品投放卡塔尔市场前通过QGOSM合格/注册流程取得——电冰箱无有效GSO/卡塔尔能效标签不能销售。标签格式、语言（通常为阿拉伯语，并附英语）及内容遵循GSO/QGOSM标识要求。
summary.zht: 在卡塔爾銷售的家用電冰箱須附貼由QGOSM在海灣能效標識計畫下管理的GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤。該標籤標注能效評級（GSO星級/等級體系）、額定/總容積、實測年耗電量及型號識別數據，須加貼於器具並在銷售點展示。標籤評級源自按GSO採用的IEC 62552試驗方法進行的能效測量及GSO能效計算，與frigqa-energy-001中的MEPS判定一致。標籤須在產品投放卡塔爾市場前通過QGOSM合格/註冊流程取得——電冰箱無有效GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤不能銷售。標籤格式、語言（通常為阿拉伯語，並附英語）及內容遵循GSO/QGOSM標識要求。

standards_or_laws: GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency labelling programme for household refrigerating appliances (administered by QGOSM under the GCC energy-efficiency programme)
GSO energy-label standard for refrigerators — star-band / class rating, derived from GSO-adopted IEC 62552 measurement
QGOSM registration — valid GSO/Qatar energy label required before market placement and at point of sale

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label (CEL) under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016). The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale (1 highest, 5 minimum threshold) and annual energy consumption, administered with the China National Institute of Standardization (CNIS). Manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing and register/file under the CEL system; there is no GCC-style cross-border label. The Chinese CEL and the GSO/Qatar star-band label are structurally different and not cross-comparable; the Chinese label cannot serve as the Qatar label.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为依据《能源效率标识管理办法》（国家发改委/市场监管总局，2016年修订）实施的中国能效标识（CEL）。中国能效标识展示1至5级评级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由中国标准化研究院（CNIS）协同管理。制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明能效等级并在CEL制度下注册/备案；不存在海湾式跨境标签。中国能效标识与GSO/卡塔尔星级标签在结构上不同且不可直接比较；中国标识不能充当卡塔尔标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為依據《能源效率標識管理辦法》（國家發改委/市場監管總局，2016年修訂）實施的中國能效標識（CEL）。中國能效標識展示1至5級評級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由中國標準化研究院（CNIS）協同管理。製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明能效等級並在CEL制度下註冊/備案；不存在海灣式跨境標籤。中國能效標識與GSO/卡塔爾星級標籤在結構上不同且不可直接比較；中國標識不能充當卡塔爾標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy-efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: Two mandatory actions with no Chinese substitute: (1) Earn the GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label — the rating must be established from GSO-adopted IEC 62552 measurement and the GSO calculation, then issued through the QGOSM registration process; the Chinese 1-to-5 grade cannot be converted to the GSO star-band/class without re-measurement and re-assessment. (2) Affix the physical GSO/Qatar label — in the required format and language (Arabic, typically with English), on the appliance and at point of sale. The Chinese CEL must be replaced or supplemented; it cannot serve as the Qatar label. Absence of a valid GSO/Qatar energy label blocks registration and is a market-surveillance trigger at retail and at customs.
gap.zh: 两项强制性要求在中国无对应替代：（1）取得GSO/卡塔尔能效标签——评级须基于GSO采用的IEC 62552测量及GSO计算确定，再通过QGOSM注册流程签发；中国1至5级不能在未重新测量和重新评估的情况下转换为GSO星级/等级。（2）加贴实体GSO/卡塔尔标签——按所需格式和语言（阿拉伯语，通常附英语），贴于器具并在销售点展示。中国能效标识须被替换或补充；不能充当卡塔尔标签。缺少有效的GSO/卡塔尔能效标签将阻止注册，并在零售和海关层面触发市场监管。
gap.zht: 兩項強制性要求在中國無對應替代：（1）取得GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤——評級須基於GSO採用的IEC 62552測量及GSO計算確定，再通過QGOSM註冊流程簽發；中國1至5級不能在未重新測量和重新評估的情況下轉換為GSO星級/等級。（2）加貼實體GSO/卡塔爾標籤——按所需格式和語言（阿拉伯語，通常附英語），貼於器具並在銷售點展示。中國能效標識須被替換或補充；不能充當卡塔爾標籤。缺少有效的GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤將阻止註冊，並在零售和海關層面觸發市場監管。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a valid GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label, earned through QGOSM registration and affixed to the appliance, is required before market placement and at point of sale in Qatar
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) / Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A valid GSO/Qatar energy-efficiency label, earned through QGOSM registration with GSO-adopted IEC 62552 measurement, is mandatory for household refrigerators sold in Qatar. The Chinese China Energy Label does not satisfy this obligation and cannot be converted to the GSO star-band rating without re-measurement; the physical Qatar label must be affixed before market placement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过QGOSM注册并以GSO采用的IEC 62552测量取得的有效GSO/卡塔尔能效标签，是家用电冰箱在卡塔尔销售的强制要求。中国能效标识不满足该义务，且在未重新测量的情况下不能转换为GSO星级评级；实体卡塔尔标签须在市场投放前加贴。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過QGOSM註冊並以GSO採用的IEC 62552測量取得的有效GSO/卡塔爾能效標籤，是家用電冰箱在卡塔爾銷售的強制要求。中國能效標識不滿足該義務，且在未重新測量的情況下不能轉換為GSO星級評級；實體卡塔爾標籤須在市場投放前加貼。
